name: Oath of the Watchers
description: The Oath of the Watchers binds Paladins to protect the mortal realm from the predations of extraplanar creatures, many of which can corrupt or destroy the unsuspecting. These Paladins are ever vigilant against the incursions of Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, and Fiends.

features.name: Oath of the Watchers Spells
features.description: The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of the Watchers Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Watcher's Will
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to invest your presence with the warding power of your faith. As an action, you choose a number of creatures you can see within 30 feet of you, up to a number equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one creature). For 1 minute, you and the chosen creatures have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

features.name: Abjure the Extraplanar
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to castigate unworldly beings. As an action, you present your {@item Holy Symbol|XPHB} and each Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or Fiend within 30 feet of you that can hear you must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0.

features.name: Aura of the Sentinel
features.description: You emit an aura of alertness while you aren't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}. When you and any creatures of your choice within your Aura of Protection roll {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, each of you gains a bonus to {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency Bonus|XPHB}.

features.name: Vigilant Rebuke
features.description: You've learned how to chastise anyone who dares wield beguilements against you and your wards. Whenever you or a creature you can see within 30 feet of you succeeds on an Intelligence, a Wisdom, or a Charisma saving throw, you can use your {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to deal {@damage 2d8} plus your Charisma modifier in Force damage to the creature that forced the saving throw.

features.name: Mortal Bulwark
features.description: You manifest a spark of divine power in defense of the mortal realm. As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you gain the benefits below for 1 minute. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required). {@b Truesight.} You gain {@variantrule Truesight|XPHB} with a range of 120 feet. {@b Advantage on Attacks.} You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, and Fiends. {@b Banishing Blow.} When you hit a creature with an attack and deal damage to it, you can force it to make a Charisma saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the creature is magically banished to its native plane of existence if it's not currently there. On a successful save, the creature can't be banished by this feature for 24 hours.
